name: Roy
description: Colonel Roy Mustang, the "Flame Alchemist," is a central character in Fullmetal Alchemist and a high-ranking officer in the Amestrian State Military. Driven by a desire to become Führer and reform the nation, he acts as a mentor to Edward Elric while using his powerful fire-based alchemy to combat corruption and the homunculi.
creator: Nekoshadow123
